title: Law No. 4 of 2022 Amending the Civil Aviation Law
summary: Adds or updates offences and enforcement provisions for operating unmanned aircraft without Civil Aviation Affairs authorisation or licence, strengthening the legal control of drone operations.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Amends civil aviation law provisions relevant to unmanned aircraft.

notes: Related instruments: Amends Law No. 14 of 2013
